business.name: Thunderstorm Roofing & Construction
business.tagline: Fortifying Dallas Homes with Precision Craftsmanship
business.hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Top-Rated Carpenter in Dallas, TX | Thunderstorm Roofing & Construction
seo.description: Expert carpenter in Dallas, TX. Custom framing, decks, trim, and more. Family-owned, precision work. Call (972) 467-8417 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Custom Carpentry That Stands the Test of Time
hero.subheadline: From intricate trim to sturdy decks, we bring your vision to life with unmatched skill and attention to detail.

featureSections.title: Custom Carpentry for Every Space
featureSections.body: Whether you need a custom built-in bookcase, crown molding, or a complete home renovation, our team delivers flawless results. We use premium materials and time-tested techniques to ensure every joint is tight and every surface is smooth.
featureSections.cardBody: Transform your backyard with a custom deck or screened porch. We design and build outdoor living spaces that blend beauty with durability.

featureSections.title: Built to Last in Dallas Weather
featureSections.subtitle: We select lumber and finishes that withstand Texas heat, humidity, and storms.
featureSections.body: Dallas weather can be tough on wood. That's why we source only kiln-dried, treated lumber and use weather-resistant fasteners. Our finishes are applied with care to protect your investment for years to come.
featureSections.cardBody: Add elegance to any room with custom baseboards, crown molding, wainscoting, and window casings. Our precise miter cuts and seamless joints create a polished look.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We're your neighbors, not a national chain. Every project gets personal attention from our family-owned business.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Our carpenters have decades of combined experience. We take pride in every cut, nail, and finish.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. You'll receive a detailed quote upfront, and we stick to it.

whyChooseUs.title: Timely Completion
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your schedule. Projects are completed on time and with minimal disruption to your daily life.

testimonials.quote: Thunderstorm built our custom deck and it turned out even better than we imagined. The team was professional, communicative, and the quality is outstanding.
testimonials.author: Mark T.

testimonials.quote: We hired them for crown molding throughout our living room. The attention to detail was incredible – perfect miters and smooth caulking. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Laura P.

testimonials.quote: After a storm damaged our fence, Thunderstorm came out quickly and rebuilt it stronger than before. Fair price and great work.
testimonials.author: James R.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From framing to finish work, Thunderstorm Roofing & Construction offers comprehensive carpentry services for Dallas homeowners. We combine old-world craftsmanship with modern techniques to deliver results that exceed expectations.

services.title: Custom Deck Building
services.shortDescription: Design and build beautiful, durable decks for outdoor living.
services.longDescription: Our custom decks are built to complement your home's architecture and your lifestyle. We work with pressure-treated lumber, cedar, composite, and PVC materials to create a space for entertaining, relaxing, and enjoying the Dallas weather.
benefits: Enhances home value and curb appeal
Built to last with weather-resistant materials

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We meet with you to discuss your vision, take measurements, and create a custom design plan.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: We help you choose the best materials for your budget and style, from wood to composite.

process.title: Construction & Finishing
process.description: Our team builds your deck with precision, applying stain or sealant for lasting beauty.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a deck?
faqs.answer: Most decks take 1-2 weeks depending on size and complexity. We'll provide a timeline during the consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits and ensure your deck meets local building codes.

services.title: Interior Trim & Molding
services.shortDescription: Add elegance with custom baseboards, crown molding, and wainscoting.
services.longDescription: Transform any room with our precision trim work. We specialize in crown molding, chair rails, wainscoting, window casings, and custom built-ins. Our carpenters ensure seamless corners and smooth transitions for a high-end look.
benefits: Custom profiles to match your home's style

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We review your space and recommend trim styles that complement your decor.

process.title: Material & Profile Selection
process.description: Choose from MDF, solid wood, or polyurethane with various profiles.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.description: Our team installs with precision, caulks, and paints for a flawless finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles or create a custom design that blends seamlessly.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim?
faqs.answer: We offer painting and staining services to match your color scheme.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry & Built-Ins
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, functional cabinetry and built-in shelving for any room.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom cabinets and built-ins. We design and build bookcases, entertainment centers, home office desks, and kitchen cabinets. Each piece is crafted to your exact specifications and installed with care.

process.title: Needs Assessment
process.description: We discuss your storage needs and design preferences.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: Our team creates detailed plans and helps you choose wood, finish, and hardware.

process.title: Fabrication & Installation
process.description: We build your cabinetry in our workshop and install it with precision.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and more. We'll help you choose the best option for your project.

faqs.question: Can you match existing cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match stain and paint colors to blend with your current cabinetry.

services.title: Fencing & Gates
services.shortDescription: Durable, attractive fences and gates for privacy and security.
services.longDescription: Protect your property with a custom fence or gate. We build wood, vinyl, and metal fences that enhance curb appeal and provide privacy. Our gates are built with strong hinges and latches for long-lasting performance.

process.title: Property Assessment
process.description: We survey your property lines and discuss your needs.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: Choose from various styles and materials to match your home.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs posts, panels, and gates with care, ensuring a straight and sturdy fence.

faqs.question: How long does a fence installation take?
faqs.answer: Most residential fences are completed in 1-3 days, depending on length and complexity.

faqs.question: Do you offer stain or paint?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can apply stain or paint to protect your fence and enhance its appearance.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Carpentry Experts
about.mission: Our mission is to provide Dallas homeowners with exceptional craftsmanship, honest communication, and lasting value. We believe every project deserves the highest standard of quality.
story: Thunderstorm Roofing & Construction was founded in 2010 by a team of master carpenters who saw a need for reliable, high-quality carpentry in Dallas. Starting with small trim jobs, our reputation for precision and integrity quickly grew. Today, we handle everything from custom decks to full home renovations, always with the same hands-on approach.

We are proud to be a family-owned business serving the Dallas community. Our team stays up-to-date with the latest techniques and materials, but we never lose sight of the fundamentals: careful measurement, solid joinery, and a commitment to customer satisfaction. When you hire Thunderstorm, you're getting more than a contractor – you're getting a partner who cares about your home as much as you do.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, ensuring every cut, joint, and finish meets our exacting standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We communicate openly, provide honest estimates, and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision guides every project. We listen, adapt, and deliver results you'll love.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we're invested in making Dallas homes better, one project at a time.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? Call or fill out our form for a free estimate.
